# Practical Guidance and Limits

Four cautions. Not every fork is equal: weight or gate specifications by
defensibility, since a wide multiverse of weak models misleads. Pre-specify the
decision space before seeing outcomes, and register it. Budget the compute:
prune redundant specifications, cache shared steps, and sample the grid when it
is enormous. Interpret the distribution as a robustness check, and read it as a
range across specifications.

*(Full chapter in preparation.)*
